scripts.dev: pnpm generate:cli-docs && pnpm prepare:agent-docs && blume dev
scripts.build: pnpm check:cli-docs && pnpm prepare:agent-docs && blume build
scripts.check: pnpm check:cli-docs && pnpm prepare:agent-docs && blume check --strict
scripts.validate: pnpm check:cli-docs && pnpm prepare:agent-docs && blume validate
